title: Historical Post-044 Workstation Migration Readiness Reassessment

It remains packet-history provenance, not a live execution instruction for current repo operations.

No source edits, no publication, no push, no host reconciliation, no package or lockfile mutation, no dependency install, no package-manager activation/download, no runtime mutation, no service mutation, no remote rewrite, no force/reset/clean, no rollback, and no old-clone mutation

sql_permission_note: This packet authorizes no database writes and no source, publication, host reconciliation, runtime, service, package, lockfile, install, remote rewrite, AI-services, Gitea, canonical-hosting, migration, force/reset/clean, rollback, or old-clone mutation. It authorizes only a bounded reassessment and authority updates.
closure_note: Executed 2026-05-04. Parent-root status remained understandable after Packet 044: Packet 044 closure drift and Packet 045 authority updates were local, while `.vercelignore` and older Packet 039 drift remained unrelated and excluded. `/home/olares/code/apex` was reconfirmed clean on `clean-main` at `c6a1546c4b61b53b823d65dae4fbcdfed24c33c0`, and `/home/olares/src/apex-power-ops-platform` was observed only at `2836a2622309b4e146ca24f23b5bf87312c0c857` with `status_count=30`. The second validated and published production-source trial strengthens the bounded host-editing evidence chain but does not approve Olares-first daily development migration. The lane remains conditionally ready only for later bounded source/test trial posture after local Packet 044 and Packet 045 authority is published and `/home/olares/code/apex` is resynchronized.
next_action: Open only Packet 046 authority publication and host-mirror resync for Packet 044 and Packet 045 closure authority. Do not approve migration or reopen generic Olares implementation.
